home.title: Next.js-Boilerplate-PostgresQL-Drizzle
home.subtitle: A production-ready Next.js Boilerplate with PostgreSQL & Drizzle ORM. Built for SaaS, dashboards, and modern web apps. Launch faster with clean code, scalable architecture, and developer-friendly tooling.
home.badge: By A. Z. M. Arif • Full Stack Software Developer

features.title: Production Ready
features.description: Best practices, scalable structure, and clean code.

features.title: Secure by Default
features.description: Auth, validation, and security built-in from day one.

features.title: Developer Friendly
features.description: TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, and modern DX.

features.title: Easy to Customize
features.description: Modular, flexible, and easy to adapt for any project.

featuresPage.title: Everything You Need To Ship Faster
featuresPage.description: This boilerplate includes a clean architecture, strong defaults, and optional modules so your product can scale without messy rewrites.

items.title: App Router + TypeScript
items.description: Modern Next.js App Router structure with strict TypeScript-first developer experience.

items.title: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
items.description: Production-ready relational data layer with SQL migrations and typed schema modeling.

items.title: Better Auth-first Flow
items.description: Authentication defaults to Better Auth, with optional custom mode support when needed.

items.title: React Query-first State
items.description: Server-state and API data fetching handled with React Query as the primary approach.

items.title: Feature Flags + Dev UI
items.description: Runtime/config flags with local development toggle page at /dev/flags.

items.title: Built-in Testing Stack
items.description: Vitest for unit/integration coverage and Playwright for end-to-end confidence.

docsPage.title: Docs You Can Jump Into Right Away
docsPage.description: These pages explain setup, architecture, and workflows so your team can onboard quickly and stay consistent.

items.title: How to Use
items.description: Getting started workflow and day-to-day usage.

items.title: Architecture
items.description: Core system design and module boundaries.

items.title: Guides
items.description: Deployment, maintenance, and project setup guides.

dashboard.overviewSubtitle: This is a domain-neutral Next.js-Boilerplate-PostgresQL-Drizzle for SaaS, internal tools, and admin dashboards.
dashboard.projectsSubtitle: Track project progress, ownership, and status in one place.
dashboard.tasksSubtitle: Use tasks to model work queues for any product or operations team.
dashboard.billingSubtitle: Track subscription and recurring revenue metrics.

users.emptyDescription: Users will appear here when available.

projects.emptyDescription: Projects will appear here when data is available.

tasks.emptyDescription: Tasks will appear here when data is available.
